title: Wave-0.6: real LocaleSwitcher/ThemeToggle — replace PreferenceRows in user menu (signed-in) + add to navbar (signed-out only)

files_to_modify: messages/en.json (+ hi/ml/es/de) ONLY if a new label string is required

acceptance_criteria: auth-button.tsx (signed-in user menu): REPLACE the existing inline PreferenceRows reimplementation (~lines 67-155, the fake theme/locale controls) with the REAL <LocaleSwitcher /> and <ThemeToggle /> components, rendered in the same menu panel near Sign out. This intentionally CHANGES existing menu UI (user-authorized — no longer 'purely additive'): remove PreferenceRows, mount the real components, no duplicate theme/locale controls remain. Sign out, sign-in branch, dropdown open/close, click-outside, and keyboard/focus must still work.

nav.tsx: add <LocaleSwitcher /> and <ThemeToggle /> to the navbar, rendered ONLY when the user is NOT signed in (unauthenticated). When signed in they must NOT appear in the navbar (they live in the user menu instead). Use the same auth/session signal nav already uses (AuthButton/useSession) — do not invent a new one.

Net visibility contract: unauthenticated visitor on /en → locale-switcher + theme-toggle testids visible in the navbar (this is what e2e/locale-switch.spec.ts T-17 and e2e/components.spec.ts T-16 assert against unauthenticated /en — they must now pass without spec changes). Signed-in user → the real components are in the user menu, not the navbar.
Do NOT modify locale-switcher.tsx / theme-toggle.tsx (they already carry their data-testid from T-06). Do NOT modify any e2e spec.
Only add an i18n string if a new visible label is introduced; if so add it to ALL messages/{en,hi,ml,es,de}.json in the existing key style; otherwise no catalog change.
npm run typecheck, npm run lint, npm run test, npm run build all pass (full project stays green). git diff limited to auth-button.tsx, nav.tsx (+ catalogs only if a string was added).
output_format: code plus plain English: where in the menu the real components replaced PreferenceRows, how the navbar gates on signed-out, confirmation no duplicate controls + Sign out/open-close unchanged, whether an i18n string was added, and the 4 verification results
